creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dima Panov from comment #28)

Thanks, do you mean the "patches for lock getfsent() usage [1]" in 943a699e47d7205726f1f77983fef0b5e6c82a56?

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/943a699e47d7205726f1f77983fef0b5e6c82a56>

<https://www.freshports.org/devel/glib20/#history>

I gained 2.72.3,2 two days ago: 

% zgrep glib /var/log/messages.0.bz2
Jul 19 06:54:18 mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd pkg[39708]: glib upgraded: 2.72.2,2 -> 2.72.3,2 
%
